subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen doth console thee, and the Lord of Names doth comfort thee. Verily, He is the All-Forgiving, the All-Bountiful. Grieve thou not for thy father, for he [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد یسلیک قلم الاعلی و یعزیک مالک الاسماء انه لهو الغفور الکریم لاتحزن فی ابیک انه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
